race.comment: ACHESON (4) raced up near the pace but couldn't maintain the pressure against open class opposition last start over 1200m at Canberra. Rock hard fit and back in a Benchmark race he looks a serious contender. JASPER'S WAY (6) has turned in a couple of eye-catchers since returning from a spell, the latest offering a fast-finishing third over 1500m at Muswellbrook. Adaptable galloper who won at his only try over this distance. Ready to peak. THE ARTEFACT (9) opened this prep with a couple of excellent efforts then floundered a bit in heavy going at this track last time, finishing a distant third. Drops in class but does need a good surface to perform optimally so monitor the track conditions. DIVINE SINNER (10) dropped in grade and returned to the winner's list recently over a similar trip at this circuit. Goes well here and cannot be overlooked despite going back up in class. A BOY NAMED SOO (7) is racing beyond expectations this campaign and must be included.
